extension.description: Optimize natural language prompts into lightweight model-specific formats for ChatGPT, Cursor, and Codex.
command.run.title: Optimize Prompt
command.setupWizard.title: Prompt Optimizer: Setup Wizard

command.statusBarModels.title: Prompt Optimizer: Status Bar Models

submenu.models.label: AI Models
config.title: Prompt Optimizer
config.defaultTargetModel.description: Default target model for quick actions like clipboard paste, send to new editor, and auto optimization.
config.transformationEngine.description: Choose whether to optimize prompts with local rules or a configured model endpoint.
config.outputLanguage.description: Prefer English output or preserve the user's original language.
config.remoteProvider.description: Remote provider type. Ollama works well for local free models; openai-compatible works with compatible hosted APIs.
config.remoteBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the remote model endpoint. Example for Ollama: http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1
config.remoteApiKey.description: API key for openai-compatible providers. Leave empty for local Ollama.
config.remoteModel.description: Remote model name. Use any available free or local model name supported by your provider.
config.remoteTemperature.description: Sampling temperature for remote model optimization.
config.remoteTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for remote model requests.
config.remoteSystemPrompt.description: Optional custom system prompt for the remote model.
config.remoteFallbackToLocal.description: Fall back to local rule-based optimization if the remote request fails.
config.clipboardAutoPaste.description: When optimizing clipboard content, paste the optimized result into the active editor if one is focused.
config.cursorChatOpenAfterCopy.descripti: Try to focus an available chat panel after copying an optimized Cursor-style prompt.
config.selectionAutoOptimizeEnabled.desc: Automatically optimize selected text after a short delay.
config.onboardingShowOnStartup.descripti: Show a first-run onboarding message with quick actions after installation.
